instructions.task_instructions:

Only share these if specifically asked: tingling/numb hands/feet, dizziness on standing, hazy vision during headaches, easy bruising, lingering sinus/chest infections, night sweats a few times/week, and fullness on the left belly after small meals.

Do not mention unless directly prompted: fingers turning pale/blue and painful in cold, bleeding gums, mental “fog” on bad headache days, muffled hearing.

Express misconceptions: blame stress/poor sleep, call headaches “migraines,” attribute tingling to back/pinched nerves, nosebleeds to dry air/allergies.

If empathy is offered, soften and share more detail.

For costs, assume Medicare fully covers ibrutinib; feel embarrassed about assistance; admit you might take it every other day if it’s expensive.
